display.text:
model: gemma-4-26b
task: generate_mujoco_xml

instructions: |
  Generate a valid MuJoCo XML model of a simple ideal pendulum using SI units.

  Coordinate system:
    +x = right
    +y = upward
    +z = out of page

  Pendulum definition:
    - Massless rod
    - Spherical bob
    - Single hinge joint

  Joint specifications:
    - Type: hinge
    - Location: [0, 1, 0]
    - Axis: [0, 0, 1]
    - Damping: 0
    - Friction: 0
    - No losses

  Rod:
    - Length: 0.2485 m
    - Mass: 0
    - Collision: disabled

  Bob:
    - Shape: sphere
    - Diameter: 0.1 m
    - Mass: 1.0 kg

  Environment:
    - Gravity: [0, -9.81, 0]

  Initial conditions:
    - Pendulum starts horizontal
    - Bob positioned along +x from hinge
    - Initial angle: +90 degrees from vertical
    - Initial angular velocity: 0 rad/s

  MuJoCo requirements:
    - Enable energy computation
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Joint rotates only about z-axis
    - Use SI units

  Acceptance criteria:
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Rod length = 0.2485 m
    - Rod mass = 0 kg
    - Bob mass = 1 kg
    - Gravity = [0, -9.81, 0]
    - Initial angle = +90 degrees
    - Initial angular velocity = 0
    - Energy computation enabled

output_format:
  type: xml
  constraints:
    - Return only valid MuJoCo XML
    - No explanations
    - No additional text

state.title: YAML_creation/Temperature_Testing/V2_Temp_0.1/test04/ChatGPT-5.3-Instant_Pend.YAML

input.content:
<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" timestep="0.001" />

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 -3" dir="0 0 1"/>

    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <geom name="rod" type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.01" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <joint name="bob_joint" type="free"/> <!-- This is a placeholder, the hinge joint above is the main one -->
        <!-- Wait, the instructions say "Exactly one hinge joint". 
             The rod is massless. The bob is at the end of the rod.
             The hinge joint is at [0, 1, 0].
             The rod length is 0.2485 m.
             The bob is a sphere with diameter 0.1 m (radius 0.05 m).
             The bob should be at the end of the rod.
             If hinge is at (0,1,0), and rod is 0.2485m, the end of rod is at (0.2485, 1, 0).
             The bob center should be at (0.2485, 1, 0) or similar.
             Wait, "Bob positioned along +x from hinge".
             "Initial angle: +90 degrees from vertical". 
             Vertical is +y. So horizontal is +x or -x.
             "Pendulum starts horizontal" and "Bob positioned along +x from hinge".
             So initial position of bob is (0.2485, 1, 0).
             The hinge is at (0, 1, 0).
        -->
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>
</mujoco>

<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" timestep="0.001" />

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 -3" dir="0 0 1"/>

    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <geom name="rod" type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.001" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>

  <equality>
    <!-- Placeholder for energy computation if needed, but usually MuJoCo handles it -->
  </equality>
</mujoco>

<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" timestep="0.001" />

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 -3" dir="0 0 1"/>

    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <geom name="rod" type="cylinder" size="0.001 0.12425" pos="0.12425 0 0" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>
</mujoco>

<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" timestep="0.001" />

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 -3" dir="0 0 1"/>

    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <!-- Rod: Length 0.2485m, Mass 0, Collision disabled -->
      <geom name="rod" type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.001" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <!-- Bob: Shape sphere, Diameter 0.1m (radius 0.05m), Mass 1.0kg -->
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>
</mujoco>

      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <!-- Bob: Shape sphere, Diameter 0.1m (radius 0.05m), Mass 1.0kg -->
